senses.gloss: Forms past-tense third-person plural masculine conjugations of verbs.

examples.text: كَتَبَ (kataba, “he wrote”) + ـُوا (-ū) → كَتَبُوا (katabū, “they m wrote”)

senses.gloss: subjunctive/jussive of ـُونَ (-ūna, present-tense verb pluralizing suffix)

examples.english: Oh my sadness for you father!
